series_metadata.series_description: Records and forms pertaining to the industrial hemp program documenting (1) the testing of samples submitted by ODA to the Consumer Protection Laboratory or a third party-laboratory or (2) the testing of samples submitted by any entity to the Consumer Protection Laboratory. This includes laboratory records from subcontractors, chain of custody paperwork, raw data, obsolete external documents related to procedures, forms and package inserts. Also included are equipment monitoring records and equipment calibration records. The section supervisor is responsible for the record retention.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Keep 5 (five) years. ; Paper: Keep 5 (five) years
